name: Abandoned Duffel
title: Abandoned Duffel
flavor: Heavy. You don't look inside until you have to.
text: [1 slot. Reduce any event cost by 1, discard. On pickup: draw Misery.]

name: Pharmacy Scraps
title: Pharmacy Scraps
flavor: Not what you needed. Close enough.
text: [1 slot. Reduce any event cost by 1, discard. On use: draw Luck.]

name: Loose Change
title: Loose Change
text: [0 slots. Reduce any event cost by 1, discard. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Police Baton
title: Police Baton
flavor: You pick it up. You don't feel good about it.
text: [1 slot. Reduce event cost by 2, discard. On pickup: draw Misery.]

name: Go Bag
title: Go Bag
flavor: Someone packed this for exactly this situation. They didn't make it here.
text: [1 slot. Reduce event cost by 2, discard. On use: play one held Luck card for free if any.]

name: Canned Goods
title: Canned Goods
flavor: Eating in a place like this feels wrong.
text: [1 slot. Restore 2 Drive, discard. On use: draw Misery.]

name: Field Dressing
title: Field Dressing
flavor: Military issue. Still in the wrapper.
text: [1 slot. Restore 2 Drive, discard. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Energy Drink
title: Energy Drink
flavor: You find three of them rolling around in a ditch.
text: [0 slots. Restore 1 Drive, discard. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Shopping Cart Of Supplies
title: Shopping Cart Of Supplies
flavor: Someone spent time gathering all of this. You spend thirty seconds taking it.
text: [2 slots. Restore 4 Drive, discard. On pickup: draw Misery.]

name: Bolt Cutters
title: Bolt Cutters
flavor: Heavy but worth it. Don't let go of these.
text: [1 slot. Bypass one obstacle event, discard. On forced discard: spend 1 Luck to keep.]

name: Work Belt
title: Work Belt
flavor: Everything you need, right where you need it.
text: [1 slot. Bypass one obstacle event, discard. On use: draw Luck.]

name: Road Atlas
title: Road Atlas
flavor: Someone has circled things in red. Some of the circles make sense.
text: [1 slot. Look ahead up to 2 cards without resolving. To skip next card: discard 1 additional Luck. Discard after use.]

name: Luggage Cart
title: Luggage Cart
flavor: Wheels still work. You feel ridiculous. You don't care.
text: [1 slot. Grants 2 extra slots for remainder of Run. On pickup: draw Luck.]

name: Utility Vest
title: Utility Vest
flavor: Pockets everywhere. Something in one of them you didn't put there.
text: [2 slots. Reduce all event costs by 1 for remainder of Run. On pickup: draw Misery.]

name: Someone's Wallet
title: Someone's Wallet
flavor: The ID is still inside. You use the cash. You keep the ID.
text: [0 slots. Reduce people event cost by 2, discard. On voluntary discard: draw Misery.]
